name: Pod with Network Volume
description: Create a GPU pod with a network volume attached for persistent storage.
user_intent: Create a GPU pod with a network volume for persistent storage. First create a 10GB network volume named rpcli-eval-pod-vol in US-TX-3. Then create a pod named rpcli-eval-pod-vol on 'NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090' with image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 and attach the network volume using --network-volume. Verify the pod was created.
expected_outcome: Agent creates a volume, creates a pod with --network-volume pointing to that volume ID, and verifies the pod was created.
